title: sonchus ustulatus subsp. ustulatus
intro: Sonchus ustulatus subsp. ustulatus, also known as the Rough-leaved Sow Thistle, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Sonchus ustulatus subsp. ustulatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine.
